headline: Shifting Story For Simon Property Group (SPG) As Analysts Rework Valuations And Leadership Changes
summary: The updated analyst model now points to a slightly higher fair value for Simon Property Group, with the target price moving from US$208.55 to US$213.55. That shift sits within a broader wave of Street research, where bullish and cautious voices are adjusting targets around new views on earnings support, funding costs, and sector sentiment. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets fit into the evolving narrative and what to watch if you follow this stock. Analyst Price Targets...
